title: cyperus congestus
intro: Cyperus congestus, also known as the umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyperus congestus include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions. Cyperus congestus is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and ointments, and can also be found in traditional remedies and folk medicines.
